## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows ZORYA-C v2.0.0 standards (K&R braces, 4-space indent, `nova_`/`novai_` prefixes)
- [ ] All pointers NULL-checked before dereference
- [ ] All allocations checked for failure
- [ ] No new compiler warnings with `-Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic`
- [ ] New functions have `@brief`, `@param`, `@return` doc comments
- [ ] New public APIs are documented
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines followed
